description_long: This is a modern, rectangular filing cabinet with a two-tone finish, featuring a light wood grain on the top, sides, and back, and smooth, matte white panels on the front. The cabinet stands on four short, angled legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The front face is divided into four sections, with two upper drawers and two lower doors, all featuring a single, continuous recessed handle in a matching wood tone. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware except for the handle. The cabinet appears to be constructed primarily from engineered wood or MDF with a laminate or veneer finish. Its size and style suggest it is suitable for storing documents or office supplies in a contemporary urban environment.
description: A modern, two-tone filing cabinet with wood grain sides and back, matte white front panels, and a recessed wood handle. It stands on short angled legs and features two upper drawers and two lower doors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the light wood grain panel with no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the white panels, two upper drawers, two lower doors, and a continuous recessed wood handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the light wood grain panel.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a full light wood grain panel with no openings or hardware.
